schema.description:
The enriched, read-time view of a `POLL` post's `typeData` — computed
fresh on every read, never stored as-is. Options and vote counts are
visible to every group member whether or not they've voted; votes are
not anonymous (see `voters` on each option).

voters.description: Everyone who voted for this option, oldest vote first.

myVoteOptionId.description: The option id you voted for, or `null` if you haven't voted.

closed.description: `true` once `closesAt` has passed. Voting a closed poll is rejected.

schema.title: PostPoll
